title.en: GPT-5.3 Instant: 26.8% Fewer Hallucinations and Smoother Conversations
title.zh: GPT-5.3 Instant：幻觉减少 26.8%，对话更自然流畅

summary.en: OpenAI released GPT-5.3 Instant, a model update focused on conversational quality and factual accuracy. Internal evaluations show a 26.8% reduction in hallucinations with web access and 19.7% without, compared to prior models. The update also significantly reduces unnecessary refusals and moralizing preambles — a response to widespread "cringe" complaints about ChatGPT's tone. Web search integration is smarter, balancing online results with the model's own reasoning rather than dumping link lists. Available in ChatGPT and via API as gpt-5.3-chat-latest.
summary.zh: OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.3 Instant，专注于对话质量和事实准确性的模型更新。内部评估显示，使用网络搜索时幻觉率降低 26.8%，仅依赖内部知识时降低 19.7%。此次更新还大幅减少了不必要的拒绝回答和说教式前置语——回应了用户对 ChatGPT 语气「令人尴尬」的广泛批评。网络搜索集成更智能，会将在线结果与模型自身推理能力相结合，而非简单罗列链接。已在 ChatGPT 和 API（gpt-5.3-chat-latest）中上线。

title.en: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Google's Fastest and Most Cost-Efficient Gemini 3 Model
title.zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：Google 最快、最具性价比的 Gemini 3 模型

summary.en: Google released Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, positioned as the fastest and most cost-efficient model in the Gemini 3 series. It outperforms the previous 2.5 Flash Lite across translation, data extraction, and code completion benchmarks while supporting multiple thinking levels for flexible speed-quality trade-offs. Designed for high-volume API use cases where cost matters most, it targets developers building AI-powered features at scale — chatbots, summarization pipelines, and real-time content processing.
summary.zh: Google 发布了 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite，定位为 Gemini 3 系列中最快、最具性价比的模型。在翻译、数据提取和代码补全基准上超越了前代 2.5 Flash Lite，同时支持多级思维模式以灵活权衡速度与质量。面向成本敏感的高频 API 调用场景，针对大规模构建 AI 功能的开发者——聊天机器人、摘要管道和实时内容处理。

title.en: Chrome Shifts to Two-Week Release Cycle Starting September 2026
title.zh: Chrome 自 2026 年 9 月起改为两周一次发布周期

summary.en: Starting with Chrome 153 on September 8, 2026, Chrome will ship new stable and beta versions every two weeks instead of four, across Desktop, Android, and iOS. The goal is faster delivery of performance fixes, security patches, and new web platform features. Smaller releases mean less disruption per update and simpler debugging. Enterprise users on Extended Stable remain on an eight-week cycle. Developers should test against beta more frequently to catch breaking changes early.
summary.zh: 从 2026 年 9 月 8 日的 Chrome 153 开始，Chrome 将在桌面、Android 和 iOS 上从四周一次改为两周一次发布稳定版和 Beta 版。目标是更快地交付性能修复、安全补丁和新的 Web 平台特性。更小的发布意味着每次更新的影响更小、调试更简单。使用 Extended Stable 的企业用户仍保持八周周期。建议开发者更频繁地针对 Beta 版进行测试，以尽早发现兼容性问题。

title.en: Vue Router 5: File-Based Routing Merged into Core with Zero Breaking Changes
title.zh: Vue Router 5：文件路由合并入核心，零破坏性变更

summary.en: Vue Router 5.0 integrates unplugin-vue-router — the popular file-based routing plugin — directly into the core package, eliminating the need for a separate dependency. The release also introduces experimental data loaders that let components wait for required data before rendering, and enhanced TypeScript support through Volar plugins and route schema validation. Maintainer Eduardo San Martin Morote described it as intentionally "boring": a major version bump driven by repository consolidation rather than API disruption, with the only breaking change being a devtools API upgrade to v8.
summary.zh: Vue Router 5.0 将流行的文件路由插件 unplugin-vue-router 直接集成到核心包中，无需再单独安装依赖。此版本还引入了实验性的数据加载器，允许组件在渲染前等待所需数据，以及通过 Volar 插件和路由 Schema 验证增强的 TypeScript 支持。维护者 Eduardo San Martin Morote 将其描述为刻意的「无聊」发布：主版本号升级源于仓库合并而非 API 变更，唯一的破坏性变更是 devtools API 升级到 v8。

title.en: LangChain Skills: Domain-Specific Instructions That Boost Agent Task Completion from 25% to 95%
title.zh: LangChain Skills：领域专用指令将智能体任务完成率从 25% 提升至 95%

summary.en: LangChain released Skills — curated markdown instructions and scripts that give coding agents domain expertise through progressive disclosure, loading only what's relevant per task. On their evaluation benchmark, Claude Code's pass rate jumped from 25% to 95% with skills enabled. The initial set covers 11 skills across LangChain (agents, tools), LangGraph (human-in-the-loop, durable execution), and DeepAgents (middleware, filesystem). Installation via npx supports both project-local and global deployment, establishing a portable pattern for augmenting any AI coding agent with specialized knowledge.
summary.zh: LangChain 发布了 Skills——经过精选的 Markdown 指令和脚本，通过渐进式加载为编码智能体提供领域专业知识，每次任务仅加载相关内容。在评估基准上，Claude Code 的通过率从 25% 跃升至 95%。首批覆盖 11 个技能，涵盖 LangChain（智能体、工具）、LangGraph（人机协作、持久执行）和 DeepAgents（中间件、文件系统）三大领域。通过 npx 安装支持项目级和全局部署，为任何 AI 编码智能体建立了一种可移植的专业知识增强模式。

title.en: Vercel Ships MCP Apps: Build Cross-Platform Agent UIs with Next.js
title.zh: Vercel 推出 MCP Apps：用 Next.js 构建跨平台智能体界面

summary.en: Vercel now supports building and deploying MCP Apps — a provider-agnostic open standard for embedded agent UIs that run inside iframes across compatible hosts like ChatGPT. The architecture uses JSON-RPC over postMessage for cross-origin communication, enabling a single UI to work across multiple AI platforms without separate integrations. With full Next.js support including Server-Side Rendering and React Server Components, developers can build rich agent interfaces once and deploy them anywhere, decoupling frontend development from specific AI provider ecosystems.
summary.zh: Vercel 现已支持构建和部署 MCP Apps——一种供应商无关的嵌入式智能体 UI 开放标准，通过 iframe 在 ChatGPT 等兼容宿主中运行。架构采用 JSON-RPC over postMessage 进行跨域通信，使单一界面无需分别集成即可在多个 AI 平台上运行。完整支持 Next.js 的服务端渲染和 React Server Components，开发者只需构建一次即可部署到任何平台，将前端开发与特定 AI 供应商生态解耦。
